pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.7.2 to align with Java 11 support and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.1.x is outdated and may lack full compatibility or security patches for Java 11 environments; upgrading ensures proper runtime support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build will target Java 8 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 11 features or potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add servlet API dependency explicitly for Java 11 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed the Java EE modules (including javax.servlet) from the JDK; explicit dependency is required to compile code using servlet APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add validation API dependency for Java 11 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed Java EE modules; explicit dependency is required to compile code using javax.validation annotations.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Change airportId type from int/Integer to long to match IdedEntity interface.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: Compile error: incompatible types when implementing IdedEntity.getId() which returns long

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Implement IdedEntity interface to standardize ID access.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: Compile error: class does not implement required interface method

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace manual getId implementation with interface override returning long.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: Compile error: return type mismatch with IdedEntity interface

src/test/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 runner annotation with JUnit 5 compatible setup for Spring Boot tests.
src/test/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: The @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) annotation is from JUnit 4 and is ignored or causes errors in JUnit 5 environments; Spring Boot 2.2+ uses JUnit 5 by default and requires the removal of JUnit 4 runner annotations to function correctly.

src/test/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Update Test import from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.
src/test/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: org.junit.Test is the JUnit 4 annotation; JUnit 5 requires org.junit.jupiter.api.Test. Using the old import with a JUnit 5 engine will result in the test not being discovered or executed.
